picks.game: Chicago White Sox @ Kansas City Royals
picks.sp_analysis: Kay: 0 ERA (UNRELIABLE — 1 start), 8.72 xERA, away split 3.86 ERA, 10.71 K/9. Recent ERA 4.29 over 1 start — reliability 0.2 UNRELIABLE, ignore 2026 numbers entirely. Lugo: 4.15 ERA, 5.06 FIP, 4.63 xERA, 7.75 K/9, 3.41 BB/9. Recent ERA 1.62 over 2 starts (SMALL SAMPLE flag). Home split: 3.6 ERA, 12.6 K/9. Reliability RELIABLE. Lugo's home split and recent form show dominance despite mediocre season numbers. Kay's 8.72 xERA signals regression coming — underlying metrics are terrible.
picks.lineup_analysis: White Sox OPS 0.000 — no offensive data available, on 3-game losing streak. Royals OPS 1.146, wOBA 0.495 — elite offense, best in this slate. Massive lineup advantage to Royals.
picks.bullpen_note: Both teams SEVERE fatigue. White Sox: Tyler Schweitzer, Jordan Leasure, Sean Newcomb. Royals: Luinder Avila, Alex Lange, Steven Cruz. Both teams back-to-back. Fatigue neutralizes as both sides equally compromised.

picks.park_note: Kauffman Stadium: 0.97 runs factor, 0.90 HR factor — pitcher friendly park suppresses scoring.

picks.key_edge: Royals elite offense (1.146 OPS) vs Kay's 8.72 xERA and UNRELIABLE status. Lugo's home dominance (3.6 ERA, 12.6 K/9) provides SP edge.
picks.rationale: Baseline home win prob 62.1%. Adjust UP 6%: Lugo home split +3%, Royals lineup advantage +3%. Final 68% vs 63.9% implied = 4.1% EV. Lugo's home splits (3.6 ERA, 12.6 K/9) show he is much better at Kauffman than season numbers suggest. Kay's 8.72 xERA and UNRELIABLE label mean his underlying metrics are terrible — regression is coming. Royals 1.146 OPS is elite, White Sox have no offensive data and are on 3-game skid. Sharp money on Royals (Pinnacle -173 vs consensus -184) confirms the edge. ML at -177 is the correct bet type — odds are reasonable and edge is clear.
picks.flags: Kay UNRELIABLE (1 start) — use 2025 stats only. Lugo SMALL SAMPLE (2 starts) — recent form directional. Both teams back-to-back. Sharp money on Royals.
